

This package is for HDRP rendering pipeline

You need to create an empty HDRP project then import this package into it:

Note: Only Unity 6 LTS is supported

Note: Only high-end platforms is supported

Note: Restart unity after import completed

Note: Control mode will be switch automatically when you connect por disconnect game controller3
